data.title: Polkadot (DOT) Nears Critical Zone: A Reversal Could Trigger 180% Surge
data.description:
Polkadot (DOT) prices have declined by 4.38% in the past day as bearish forces continue to gain stronger market control. According to data from CoinMarketCap, DOT’s price fall only underlines the asset’s form in recent days as indicated by the 7.99% loss in the last week. However, market analyst Ali Martinez postulates that this downtrend could soon result in something positive. Related...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/polkadot-dot/polkadot-dot-nears-critical-zone-a-reversal-could-trigger-180-surge/

data.title: CZ forwarded Kuai Dong’s disclosure article on market maker Web3Port
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ forwarded Kuai Dong (@_FORAB)'s disclosure article on market maker Web3Port. The article highlights include: May Liu and her team established a "Binance brokerage pipeline", from Spark Digital Capital to Web3Port, and then to Whisper. Initially, Spark operated in the name of VC, but actually relied on market outsourcing + FA business to let VC invest in projects and obtain free tokens. After the industry's internal rollback in 21 and 22, the project party was unwilling to give tokens for free. They turned to the incubator model and established Web3Port to provide project packaging and VC docking in exchange for 1-3% tokens. However, the incubator alone cannot realize cash, so the market maker Whisper was established, in the name of market making, to create a delivery window for the free tokens in their hands. In the end, this system became a complete pipeline from packaging financing to exit, and Binance retail investors became the final payers. According to previous news, Kuai Dong stated that the passive market maker of GSR and SHELL is GSR, and the active market maker is Web3port.

data.title: CleanSpark Joins S&P SmallCap 600 Index
data.description:
According to PANews, CleanSpark, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, announced on the X platform that it has been included in the S&P SmallCap 600 Index. This index is often referred to as the 'small-cap index' and primarily reflects emerging trends and innovative forces in the economy.

Recent financial reports from CleanSpark reveal that the company currently holds 11,177 Bitcoins. In February, the company mined 624 Bitcoins, contributing to a total of 1,250 Bitcoins mined in the fiscal year 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin reserve backlash signals unrealistic industry expectations
data.description:
“Not that long ago, even the idea of BTC Reserve held and supported by a federal government was a revolutionary idea,” a blockchain regulatory expert told Cointelegraph.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-bitcoin-reserve-disappoints-investors-trump-crypto-summit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
